# Support

- **Using or contributing to Choices:** start with [README.md](../README.md), [docs/GETTING_STARTED.md](../docs/GETTING_STARTED.md), and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- **Security vulnerabilities:** use [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) (private report — do not open a public issue).
- **Product / UX while using the app:** use the **in-app feedback widget** when it is enabled (sends context to **Admin → Feedback**). How this relates to **GitHub Issues** is explained in [docs/FEEDBACK_AND_ISSUES.md](../docs/FEEDBACK_AND_ISSUES.md).
- **Bugs and features for the open-source repo:** this repository’s **Issues** tab (templates: bug, feature, documentation).

Maintainers will point you to the right doc when the answer already lives in `docs/`.
